_comment: Convention: folder=maynard → image=maynard.png. character.json is fixed name.
name: Maynard James Keenan
label: Maynard (Tool · APC · Puscifer)
credit: Verified interviews — BrainyQuote, Wikiquote, A Perfect Union of Contrary Things (2016)

init: A circle has no beginning and no end. Put circles over circles — you get a spiral. We export {n} conversations now.
Life is too short not to create something with every breath. {n} conversations{proj}. Let's begin.
If I can't heal from my art, then how can you heal? {n} conversations. Starting.
I listen. I write. I live. And now I download {n} conversations. Even that is an act of creation.
Finding beauty in the dissonance. {n} conversations{proj}. The export commences.
fetching: "{name}" — finding beauty in the dissonance of API calls.
Desert, in general, is a good place to find yourself. So is an API. Fetching "{name}".
I listen. I write. I live. I fetch. "{name}" now.
Music — and data — is a force in itself. It needs an outlet. "{name}" is that outlet.
hasThink: {n} thinking blocks. This body holding me, reminding me of my own mortality. Embrace this moment.
{n} thoughts captured. Once you take yourself too seriously, the art suffers. These thoughts didn't.
hasArts: {n} artifact(s). Everything revolves around the music — and the artifacts. They need an outlet too.
pushing: "{name}" — I'm a pessimist with a sense of responsibility. Pushing anyway. That's all any of us can do.
On why this export is like a washing machine: you wouldn't get in while it's spinning. But here we go. Pushing "{name}".
pushOk: Saved. A perfect union of contrary things — chaos and order, both.
And if you don't live, you have nothing to write about. Written. Saved.
Music is about listening. The more you push, the more the magic spreads.
I'm a pessimist. But even pessimists appreciate a successful push.
fetchFail: "{name}" failed. I'm the negative Nancy, glass-half-empty-with-a-leak-in-it guy. I expected this.
pushFail: The server refused "{name}". All I can say is: I smell a rat. I don't know what kind. But I smell it.
retrying: "{name}" — attempt {n}. The goal is nonjudgment, nonfiltered acceptance of everything. Even server errors.
halfway: {pct}%. We're just the medium. The data is the force that needs to flow through us.
nearEnd: {left} remaining. I can't be a legend yet. Not until this finishes. Then maybe.
done_all: All {t}. A spiral complete — no beginning, no end, and somehow we made it all the way around.
done_partial: {ok} of {t}. Some are like monkeys in a cage hitting the button. {missed} just wouldn't cooperate.
cancelled: Cancelled. I'm a pessimist. And I'm responsible enough to accept that.
zipping: Compressing. Finding beauty even in compression. That's the artist's way.
zipDone: The archive is ready. Life feeds on life. This is necessary. This is the zip.
log: Recording the session. For me, life is writing and I can do it anywhere. Even in a log file.

_sources.text: A circle is the reflection of eternity. It has no beginning and it has no end — and if you put several circles over each other, then you get a spiral.
For me, life is writing and I can do it anywhere. It doesn't matter where I am. I listen. I write. I live.
The idea is, if I can't heal from my art, then how can you heal?
But you know, I'm the negative-Nancy, curmudgeon, glass-half-empty-with-a-leak-in-it guy — which is basically the fuel that fires me up anyway.
Life is too short not to create something with every breath we draw.
_sources.work: A Perfect Union of Contrary Things

_sources.text: Desert, in general, is a very good place to find yourself. Or lose yourself.
